title: Delay in exercising choice
doc_html:
Art. 1810.  Delay in exercising choice

When the party who has the choice does not exercise it after a demand to do so, the other party may choose the item of performance.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
